g.text: State 2: P20 loaded; P10 marked dirty by caller
Access 4: fetch_page(P40) — last free frame used
State 4: Pool FULL — all 4 frames occupied
State 5: P10 moves to LRU HEAD (still dirty)
State 6: P50 loaded into Frame 1 (was P20)
Dirty W/B | 0 | no dirty page evicted (P10 saved by HIT)
Pin Skips | 0 | P30 not yet encountered for eviction
P10 was at tail, now at head — saved from eviction
EVICT P20 — clean page, no write-back needed
If P20 were pinned, scan would continue:
WRITE-BACK P10 to disk FIRST, then evict frame
